pattern: A three-node tree reduces to a single equality check between the root and its two children.
hints: The tree is guaranteed to be exactly a root with a left and a right child.
You only need three values: the root and each of its children.
Return whether the root's value equals the left child's value plus the right child's value.

edge_inputs.description: root does not equal the sum
children at the value extremes summing to zero
children swapped order still sums the same

stress.description: random three-node trees; roughly half satisfy the equality
